subject: chin_a_sl
syllabus: Chinese A: Language and Literature (first assessment 2021), SL scope
note: Language subjects use skill KPs. Literary and non-literary analysis are both included. All new KPs start covered=false until school coverage is confirmed.

kps.name: Identify text type, purpose, audience and context
Develop a precise, defensible interpretation
Select concise and relevant textual evidence
Analyze diction, syntax, imagery and rhetorical devices
Analyze structure, voice, perspective and tone
Explain how form and technique shape meaning and reader response
Use the guiding question to establish an analytical focus
Analyze visual, verbal and multimodal features together
Evaluate audience positioning, ideology and representation
Organize a coherent line of inquiry
Integrate evidence and analysis within paragraphs
Write accurately and precisely in formal Chinese
Demonstrate detailed knowledge of two studied literary works
Build sustained similarities and differences around the question
Use work-specific evidence without retelling plot
Formulate a comparative thesis that answers the prompt
Compare authorial choices, not only content
Maintain balanced treatment and coherent progression
Define a focused and significant global issue
Analyze a literary extract and its wider work
Analyze a non-literary extract and its wider body of work
Balance both extracts within a clear ten-minute structure
Use precise analytical language and fluent delivery
Respond thoughtfully and specifically to follow-up questions
Readers, writers and texts
Time and space
Intertextuality: connecting texts
Identity, culture and representation
Communication, perspective and transformation
Creativity and the construction of meaning
